<!-- Title format / 標題格式: type(scope): description  (e.g. feat(battle): ..., fix(scene): ...)
     Full guide / 完整指南: .github/PR-format-guide.md -->

## Summary / 摘要
<!-- 1–3 sentences: what this PR does. / 1–3 句話：這個 PR 做了什麼。 -->

## Why / 動機
<!-- Problem or need. Link the issue: Closes #123 / Refs #123. / 問題背景，連結 issue。 -->

## Changes / 變更內容
<!-- Bullet list, grouped by area. / 條列變更，依模組分組。 -->

-

## How to test / 測試方式
<!-- Commands + results, and manual steps. Never leave blank — "Not tested" is valid info. -->
<!-- 指令與結果、手動驗證步驟。不可留白，寫「未測試」也行。 -->

## Screenshots / 截圖
<!-- Required for UI changes: before/after. Delete this section if no UI change. -->
<!-- UI 變更必附前後對照；無 UI 變更可刪除此區塊。 -->

## Breaking changes / 破壞性變更
<!-- What breaks, who is affected, migration steps. Delete if none. / 沒有就刪除此區塊。 -->

## Notes for reviewers / 給審查者的備註
<!-- Reading order, trade-offs, deferred follow-ups. Delete if none. / 沒有就刪除此區塊。 -->
